name: Pharmaceutical Resilience Crisis
description: A critical cold-chain pharmaceutical container amid severe thunderstorm and lightning near Tuas, increased estimated congestion and a relevant Malacca Strait disruption. Safety stock 1.5 days, 24–48h expected delay.
narrative: A critical pharmaceutical container with a cold-chain requirement is inbound while a severe thunderstorm with lightning sits over Tuas, estimated congestion is elevated and a relevant Malacca Strait disruption is active. Safety stock is only 1.5 days against a 24–48h expected delay. Options: wait, reroute, or emergency replenishment.

disruptions.title: Simulated Malacca Strait disruption affecting inbound pharma
disruptions.summary: Simulated advisory: Malacca Strait disruption adding an estimated 24–48h to some Singapore-bound arrivals, including a critical pharmaceutical container.
disruptions.operationalImpact: Slow steaming and increased approach density into Tuas.
disruptions.supplyChainImpact: 24–48h delay against 1.5 days of cold-chain safety stock; high spoilage/service risk.
disruptions.suggestedResponse: Prioritise cold-chain cargo; compare wait vs reroute vs emergency replenishment; escalate for human decision.

disruptions.title: Severe thunderstorm and lightning near Tuas
disruptions.summary: Simulated advisory: lightning within ~5km of the monitoring point; outdoor handling pauses likely.
disruptions.operationalImpact: Temporary handling suspensions during lightning risk.
disruptions.supplyChainImpact: Compounds the arrival delay for the cold-chain container.
disruptions.suggestedResponse: Monitor lightning; protect cold-chain reefer power/temperature continuity.
